overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hitman 3 showing Agent 47 exploring Thornbridge Manor. The character moves from a dark wood-paneled corridor into a grand reception hall with a fireplace and staircase, then ascends to an upper floor with exposed wooden beams and gothic windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark wood-paneled entrance corridor with chandeliers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dimly lit corridor toward large wooden door at the end

notable_agents.action: maid in uniform standing near the wall in the distance

entered.detail: crystal chandelier hanging from the ceiling illuminating the corridor
large dark wooden double door at the end of the corridor
tall ornate candelabra with multiple lit candles

segments.scene_description: Agent 47 walks through a narrow, dimly lit corridor with dark wood paneling and crystal chandeliers. He approaches a large wooden double door at the end of the hallway, with a maid visible standing in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand manor reception hall with high ceilings and tall windows

events.description: opens large wooden door entering bright main hall from dark corridor
moves deeper into hall where natural light from tall windows mixes with interior chandeliers

agents.ego_description: entering the grand hall and walking toward the reception desk area

notable_agents.action: receptionist standing behind the wooden desk facing the entrance
staff member in uniform standing near the base of the grand staircase

entered.detail: large ornate wooden reception desk with various items and a globe on top
sweeping wooden staircase with carved railings leading to upper floor
tall arched windows with multiple panes letting in bright natural light
brown leather sofa set arranged in the sitting area
large chandelier hanging from the high ceiling of the hall

segments.scene_description: Upon opening the door, the scene transitions to a spacious grand hall with high ceilings and tall gothic windows. A large reception desk sits in the center with a grand staircase visible to the left. The lighting shifts from artificial to mixed natural and interior light as the character enters the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: sitting area with large stone fireplace and portrait

agents.ego_description: walking across the hall toward the fireplace and portrait area on the far side

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with active fire burning inside
large framed portrait of a woman hanging above the fireplace mantel
tufted leather armchair positioned near the fireplace
tall dark wood bookshelves lining the wall filled with books

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the hall toward a prominent stone fireplace with a large portrait hanging above it. Leather furniture and bookshelves furnish this area, while the reception desk and entrance fade into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: fireplace interaction area in the main hall

events.description: character interacts with the fireplace, examining the interior or triggering a mechanism
character turns around 180 degrees and walks away from fireplace toward the room center

agents.ego_description: examining the fireplace closely then turning to survey the room and walk back toward the center

segments.scene_description: Agent 47 stops at the fireplace to interact with it, then turns around to face back toward the room. The fireplace and portrait move out of view as the character walks back toward the center of the hall, with the reception desk and staircase coming back into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with portrait gallery wall

events.description: character begins ascending the wooden staircase to the upper floor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the grand staircase and climbing the steps to the upper floor

notable_agents.action: security guard or butler in suit standing at base of stairs observing

entered.detail: carpeted wooden staircase steps with carved banisters
wall covered with framed portraits and hunting trophies alongside the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the grand staircase where a security guard stands watch. He begins ascending the stairs, passing a gallery wall adorned with portraits, while the main hall furniture recedes below.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor gallery with exposed wooden beams and gothic windows

events.description: reaches top of stairs entering upper floor corridor with exposed beam architecture

agents.ego_description: exploring the upper floor with exposed wooden beams, antique furniture, and gothic windows

entered.detail: exposed dark wooden ceiling beams and rafters characteristic of attic architecture
brass telescope on tripod positioned near the window
antique wooden chest with metal fittings on the floor
pointed arch gothic window with multiple panes letting in daylight

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the architecture changes to an upper floor with exposed wooden beams and a pitched roof. The character explores this area, passing an antique telescope and wooden chest near gothic windows, while the staircase falls away below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit corridor into the expansive, multi-level architecture of a grand manor. It begins by following Agent 47 through a narrow hallway of dark wood paneling and crystal chandeliers before he opens a set of double doors to reveal a spacious reception hall bathed in mixed natural and interior light. As the camera moves deeper into the room, the space shifts from the open area of the reception desk toward an intimate lounge featuring a stone fireplace, leather furniture, and a large portrait. The perspective then pivots away from the hearth to approach a grand staircase, ascending past a gallery of portraits as the main hall recedes below. Finally, the scene opens onto an upper floor characterized by exposed wooden beams and a pitched roof, passing an antique telescope and wooden chest beside gothic windows.
